title: [phase:repair] [family:post-fix-review] [provider_hint:codex] Review the modified Stripe files in /Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer and report the single highest remaining risk, if any. Keep it to 2 short bullets with absolute paths.
summary_text: - High risk: [`/Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/.env.example#L23`]( /Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/.env.example#L23 ) removed the Stripe env examples, but the runtime still hard-requires `STRIPE_SECRET_KEY`, `STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET`, `STRIPE_PRICE_*`, and allowed redirect origins in [`/Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/_shared/stripe.ts#L21`]( /Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/_shared/stripe.ts#L21 ) and [`/Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/_shared/validation.ts#L35`]( /Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/_shared/validation.ts#L35 ); a fresh deploy/local setup can now silently ship misconfigured and fail checkout/portal/webhooks at runtime. - No higher remaining code-path risk stood out in the modified Stripe handlers: [`/Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/create-checkout-session/index.ts`]( /Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/create-checkout-session/index.ts ), [`/Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/customer-portal/index.ts`]( /Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/customer-portal/index.ts ), and [`/Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/stripe-webhook/index.ts`]( /Users/masayuki/Dev/Content_Analyzer/supabase/functions/stripe-webhook/index.ts ).
